name: Meerkat Manor: Rise of the Dynasty
original_name: Meerkat Manor: Rise of the Dynasty
overview: Continuing the compelling saga of the heartstring-tugging, dramatic tale of survival revolving around three families of meerkats who are descendants of the legendary meerkat matriarch, Flower. Neighbors and rivals who share a bloodline are forced to compete for food and resources in an environment that is undergoing a great deal of change: the Kalahari Desert in South Africa.

trailers.title: Trailer ‘Meerkat Manor Rise of the Dynasty’
